title: Manufacture, transfer, or possession of machine guns unlawful; exceptions
doc_html:
§1752. Manufacture, transfer, or possession of machine guns unlawful; exceptions

            A. No person shall manufacture, transfer, or possess a machine gun within this state.

            B. This Section shall not apply to any of the following:

            (1) A transfer to or from, or possession by or under the authority of, the United States or any department or agency thereof.

            (2) A transfer to or from, or possession by or under the authority of, any state of the United States or a department, agency, or political subdivision thereof.

            (3) Any machine gun that is lawfully manufactured, transferred, or possessed under federal law.

            Acts 1932, No. 80, §2; Acts 2023, No. 120, §1.
doc_text:
§1752.  Manufacture, transfer, or possession of machine guns unlawful; exceptions
A.  No person shall manufacture, transfer, or possess a machine gun within this state.
B.  This Section shall not apply to any of the following:
(1)  A transfer to or from, or possession by or under the authority of, the United States
or any department or agency thereof.
(2)  A transfer to or from, or possession by or under the authority of, any state of the
United States or a department, agency, or political subdivision thereof.
(3)  Any machine gun that is lawfully manufactured, transferred, or possessed under
federal law.
Acts 1932, No. 80, §2; Acts 2023, No. 120, §1.
